title: Grilled Cheese Fritters with Floral Aioli
description: A sweet and savory Portuguese-inspired dish featuring crispy grilled cheese fritters served with a creamy floral aioli. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: sharp or mild, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: grill seasoning
ingredients.notes: such as paprika or garlic powder

instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together the shredded cheese, honey, and a pinch of salt.
Dip each bread cube into the beaten eggs, coating completely, then roll in the cheese-honey mixture to coat.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few bread cubes to the skillet and flatten slightly with a spatula.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
To make the floral aioli, mix together the cream, a pinch of salt, and a few drops of floral extract (such as lavender or chamomile).
Serve the fritters with a dollop of the aioli on top.
